title: Unidentified Imperial captain (asteroid victim)

{{Quote|Considering the amount of damage we've sustained, they must have been destroyed.|Captain Lorth Needa|<ref name="ESB" />}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''captain''' served with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], commanding an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] during the aftermath of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. During the search for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] in the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]], the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] appeared in [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] form during a conference of twenty [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] also participating in the search. As the conference, led by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], progressed, the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge tower]] of the Captain's [[Unidentified Imperial-class Star Destroyer (asteroid collision)|Star Destroyer]] was hit by a massive [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]], obliterating the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and [[Death/Legends|killing]] him.

==Biography==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> a fair-skinned [[Human/Legends|
Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="ESB" /> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]<ref name="ESB junior novel">[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' junior novelization]]</ref> commanded [[Unidentified Imperial-class Star Destroyer (asteroid collision)|one of]] the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyers]] participating in the search for [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Solo, along with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], his [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Pilot/Legends|co-pilot]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|protocol]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], had fled the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]' [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] and, due to a broken [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], were forced to hide within one of the many [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]] to avoid being captured by the Imperial [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]].<ref name="ESB" />

The [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] desired to capture the crew of the ''Millennium Falcon'' to use them as bait for capturing his son, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. In an attempt to find the ''Falcon'', Vader ordered Death Squadron into the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], and many [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] suffered heavy casualties under the continual bombardment of asteroids.<ref name="ESB" />

[[File:YouCanProbablyBuffThatOut-ESBHD.jpg|thumb|left|250px|This captain died when his Star Destroyer was obliterated in an asteroid collision.]]
This captain was present in [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] form during a conference of twenty other [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], Vader's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], to discuss the whereabouts of the ''Millennium Falcon''. During the conference, the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge tower]] of this captain's Star Destroyer was hit by a large hurdling asteroid.<ref name="ESB" /> The collision resulted in both his [[Death/Legends|death]] and the destruction of his [[Starship/Legends|ship]]<ref name="ESB novel" /> as the captain's holographic image faded quickly away.<ref name="ESB" />

==Equipment==
The captain wore the standard-issue [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]] during his service aboard his Star Destroyer<ref name="ESB" /> in 3 ABY.<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
This unidentified Star Destroyer captain first appeared in the [[1980]] [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|novelization]] of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="ESB novel" /> In the film, the officer is portrayed by Effects Cameraman [[Jim Veilleux]],<ref name="Making Of TESB.">''[[The Making of "The Empire Strikes Back"]]''</ref> who was uncredited for the role, and is only briefly seen in holographic form.<ref name="ESB" />
